title: Outer Rim Fauna
description: The outer layer animals are small and relatively harmless: sheep, wild dogs, puffins, mink, and reindeer. These provide early game food and materials (wool, leather, meat). Animals can be hunted or potentially domesticated.
definition-of-done: Outer rim fauna spawns appropriately. Animals can be hunted for resources. Basic animal AI for movement and behavior.
testing-plan: Verify all animal types spawn in outer rim. Test hunting mechanics and resource drops. Verify animal AI behaves correctly.
todos: Build resource drop system for animals
